name: strange hexagonal room
description: I'm in a strange hexagonal room
items_start: Small piece of plastic flush in the wall
Rod jutting straight out of the wall
hints: This hexagonal room is clearly alien technology.
The curtain of light is a teleporter - but it can be dangerous!
The goggles, plastic piece, and rod are all important. Take the goggles.
TOUCH the curtain gently instead of GO CURT - TOUC CURT is safe, GO CURT can kill you!

effects: Message: A gentle touch will work wonders!

notes: Alien hexagonal room with teleporter curtain. TOUCH CURT to teleport safely; GO CURT without preparation is lethal.
